title: Chill Oasis SMP s3
description: The Official Chill Oasis SMP S3 Modpack!!
body:
![CH Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7f1d87ea2863d2e508acd50dffee5b8c9e5e24b7.png)
# THE OFFICIAL CHILL OASIS SEASON 3 MODPACK! 💜
## This modpack is built around transportation, create, and exploration!!
### 🖥️ Specs Tested:
**GPUs:**

RTX 3070 (180~ FPS W/Shaders| 250~ FPS Without Shaders)

**CPUs:**

AMD Ryzen 7 5800x

### 💻 (Singleplayer Tested) RAM to allocate:

**Recommend: 10 GB**

**Best Performance: 12 GB**

### ⏳ Future Verisons of MC?
Currently, we won't be able to update the modpack due to many reasons. The most simple way to put it, most mods aren't updated!

### 🔨 Forge Version?
No Forge or Neo-Forge versions in development.

### ⚠️ Known Issues
- Slime balls thrown into oceans crashes clients
- gravestones lag the game for a minute on clients
